Description:  spells it φαιναμενου. TR spells it φαινομενου.
 is clearly errant in that the word is spelled with two sigmas (ςσ) and no omicron (οσ) as a vowel as in TR.
 - φροφητου spelling error φ should be π TR – προφητου
TR uses νομιστε replacing οητε with σητε.
ι should precede . TR uses ποιει
 shows ἐιτ ο. TR shows εἰς τὸ
 shows ἐιμὴ. TR shows ἐι μὴ
